creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Last few days of Ramadan! Don’t miss the Ramadan District at Jumeirah Emirates Towers!

This colorful Ramadan pop-up showcases the best of Emirati and regional culture. It is an artisan market featuring a wide range of activities, entertainment, food trucks, and retail shops! 

🗓️ Until end of Ramadan, 6PM to 2AM
📍Jumeirah Emirates Towers Arena, near Museum of the Future
🚆Nearest metro station: Emirates Towers

Tag your family and friends!
